summary: A clip from a Fox News segment labeled AMERICA REPORTS with a LOS ANGELES label. An anchor speaks in a studio, then phone-style footage shows a crowded university lecture hall with people standing and moving among the seats. A statement graphic headed FEDERALIST SOCIETY UCLA STATEMENT shows a quotation attributed to a chapter president. The lower-third reads FAR-LEFT ACTIVISTS SWARM UCLA EVENT W/ DHS LAWYER.
